creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->suspended


> if you open the menus they are all in black. So you cannot see a single line. 

the menus will turn black on mous rollover, no fix known. 
Please report it to the developers. 

> Furthermore it's impossible to use Vice (performance-wise) since several updates of Xorg. 

I see no performance problems on FreeBSD 6.3 with Athena widgets (xawd3d).
